name: Chicken Marengo
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into pieces and sprinkle with salt, pepper, and flour.
2. Brown the seasoned chicken in oil.
3. Set aside the browned chicken.
4. In the same pan, sauté onions and garlic until fragrant.
5. Add the remaining ingredients (tomatoes, sherry) to the pan.
6. Cover and simmer for 30-40 minutes, or until the chicken is tender.
7. White wine can be substituted for sherry if desired.
